# Zamorak 1000% Group Ranged-Melee (Hybrid) <:range:580168050121113623> <:melee:1096130867279171706>
.img:https://img.pvme.io/images/E9HmNuzAe2.png
*Note: a **Table of Contents** can be found in the pins.*

.
## __Introduction__
.tag:intro
This is an **advanced guide** which assumes a strong underlying knowledge of all mechanics and information presented in <#1020560033173479464> and <#1251104943566491710>.

.
## __Presets and Relics__
.tag:presets
⬥ [Ranged-Melee](https://presets.pvme.io?id=36595423-fd75-4c24-bc0b-14ee434c294d) <:range:580168050121113623> <:melee:1096130867279171706>
.

.
## __Rotations__
.tag:rotations
⬥ This rotation can achieve sub 3:30 kills.
⬥ Pad order used: **2 → 1 → 4 → 6 → 5 → 3**

.
### __Witches__
.
### Last Witch
<:deathsporearrows:900758234527301642> <:gdeathsswift:994644354536837121> → <:imbueshadows:1478061866193518744> → <:fularrow:971025696958853180> <:grico:787904334812807238>

.
### __Phase 1__
.
### Base
<:bolg:994189289623662702> <:spec:537340400273195028> → <:ecb:615618531937222657> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:galeshot:1478061864943616122> → (charge pad) <:rapid:535541270521708566> → <:sgb:626466665848242186> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:deadshot:1478061860371828929> → <:gloomfirebow:1446178203608809472> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:gloomfirebow:1446178203608809472> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:grico:787904334812807238> → <:meteorstrike:1478070401702821938> → <:adaptivestrike:1478062906057949417> → <:berserk:535532854004678657> → <:res:535541258844635148>

.
### Witch
<:bolg:994189289623662702> <:spec:537340400273195028> → <:ecb:615618531937222657> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:galeshot:1478061864943616122> → <:rapid:535541270521708566> → <:sgb:626466665848242186> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:deadshot:1478061860371828929> → <:gloomfirebow:1446178203608809472> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:gloomfirebow:1446178203608809472> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> / <:snipe:1478061857486143498> → <:grico:787904334812807238> + <:realmmovement:1073955377537876089> → <:anti:535541306475151390> → <:gbarge:535532879250456578> → <:assault:535532855191928842> → <:meteorstrike:1478070401702821938> → <:adaptivestrike:1478062906057949417> + <:realmmovement:1073955377537876089>

*Note: witch/free can <:snipe:1478061857486143498> with <:nightmaregauntlets:513190159441723392> if on 3 <:perfectequilibrium:1006119102814887957> stacks, at every Ranged phase.*

.
### __Phase 2__
.
### Base
<:gbarge:535532879250456578> → <:overpower:535532879334080517> → <:ezk:903244090953588787> <:spec:537340400273195028> → <:assault:535532855191928842> → <:varanussmercy:1448697873603498045> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:cane:535532878969438210> → <:gfury:535532879334080527> → <:varanussmercy:1448697873603498045> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:deathsporearrows:900758234527301642> <:piercingshot:1478061863723073636> → <:grico:787904334812807238> → <:piercingshot:1478061863723073636> → <:gdeathsswift:994644354536837121> → <:imbueshadows:1478061866193518744> → <:fularrow:971025696958853180> <:bolg:994189289623662702> <:spec:537340400273195028>

.
### Witch
<:berserk:535532854004678657> → <:res:535541258844635148> → <:gbarge:535532879250456578> → <:overpower:535532879334080517> → <:assault:535532855191928842> → <:ezk:903244090953588787> <:spec:537340400273195028> → <:varanussmercy:1448697873603498045> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:cane:535532878969438210> → <:gfury:535532879334080527> → <:varanussmercy:1448697873603498045> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> + <:realmmovement:1073955377537876089> → <:anti:535541306475151390> → <:overpower:535532879334080517> → (<:punish:535532879439069184> / <:adaptivestrike:1478062906057949417>) → <:imbueshadows:1478061866193518744> + <:realmmovement:1073955377537876089> → <:deathsporearrows:900758234527301642> <:grico:787904334812807238> → <:gdeathsswift:994644354536837121>

.
### __Phase 3__
.
### Base
<:galeshot:1478061864943616122> → (charge pad) <:rapid:535541270521708566> → <:sgb:626466665848242186> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:deadshot:1478061860371828929> → <:gloomfirebow:1446178203608809472> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:gloomfirebow:1446178203608809472> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:grico:787904334812807238> → <:meteorstrike:1478070401702821938> → <:adaptivestrike:1478062906057949417> → <:berserk:535532854004678657> → <:devo:513190158728953857>

.
### Witch
<:galeshot:1478061864943616122> → <:rapid:535541270521708566> → <:bolg:994189289623662702> <:spec:537340400273195028> → <:fularrow:971025696958853180> <:sgb:626466665848242186> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:deadshot:1478061860371828929> → <:gloomfirebow:1446178203608809472> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:grico:787904334812807238> + <:realmmovement:1073955377537876089> → <:anti:535541306475151390> → (2t) <:gbarge:535532879250456578> → <:assault:535532855191928842> → <:meteorstrike:1478070401702821938> → <:adaptivestrike:1478062906057949417> + <:realmmovement:1073955377537876089>

.
### __Phase 4__
.
### Base
<:gbarge:535532879250456578> → <:overpower:535532879334080517> → <:gflurry:535532879283879977> → <:chaosroar:1478062908767211640> → <:ezk:903244090953588787> <:spec:537340400273195028> → <:cane:535532878969438210> → <:gfury:535532879334080527> → <:varanussmercy:1448697873603498045> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:deathsporearrows:900758234527301642> <:piercingshot:1478061863723073636> → <:grico:787904334812807238> → <:piercingshot:1478061863723073636> → <:gdeathsswift:994644354536837121> → <:imbueshadows:1478061866193518744> → <:fularrow:971025696958853180> <:bolg:994189289623662702> <:spec:537340400273195028>

.
### Witch
<:berserk:535532854004678657> → <:res:535541258844635148> → <:gbarge:535532879250456578> → <:overpower:535532879334080517> → <:gflurry:535532879283879977> → <:chaosroar:1478062908767211640> → <:ezk:903244090953588787> <:spec:537340400273195028> → <:gfury:535532879334080527> → <:varanussmercy:1448697873603498045> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> + <:realmmovement:1073955377537876089> → <:anti:535541306475151390> → <:overpower:535532879334080517> → (<:punish:535532879439069184> / <:adaptivestrike:1478062906057949417>) → <:imbueshadows:1478061866193518744> + <:realmmovement:1073955377537876089> → <:deathsporearrows:900758234527301642> <:grico:787904334812807238> → <:gdeathsswift:994644354536837121>

.
### __Phase 5__
.
### Base
<:galeshot:1478061864943616122> → (charge pad) <:rapid:535541270521708566> → <:sgb:626466665848242186> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:deadshot:1478061860371828929> → <:gloomfirebow:1446178203608809472> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:gloomfirebow:1446178203608809472> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:grico:787904334812807238> → <:meteorstrike:1478070401702821938> → <:adaptivestrike:1478062906057949417> → <:berserk:535532854004678657> → <:res:535541258844635148>

.
### Witch
<:galeshot:1478061864943616122> → <:rapid:535541270521708566> → <:bolg:994189289623662702> <:spec:537340400273195028> → <:fularrow:971025696958853180> <:sgb:626466665848242186> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:deadshot:1478061860371828929> → <:gloomfirebow:1446178203608809472> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:grico:787904334812807238> + <:realmmovement:1073955377537876089> → <:anti:535541306475151390> → (2t) <:gbarge:535532879250456578> → <:assault:535532855191928842> → <:meteorstrike:1478070401702821938> → <:adaptivestrike:1478062906057949417> + <:realmmovement:1073955377537876089>

.
### __Phase 6__
.
### Base
<:gbarge:535532879250456578> → <:overpower:535532879334080517> → <:gflurry:535532879283879977> → <:varanussmercy:1448697873603498045> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:gfury:535532879334080527> → <:varanussmercy:1448697873603498045> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:overpower:535532879334080517> → <:chaosroar:1478062908767211640> → <:ezk:903244090953588787> <:spec:537340400273195028> → <:punish:535532879439069184>

.
### Witch
<:berserk:535532854004678657> → <:res:535541258844635148> → <:gbarge:535532879250456578> → <:overpower:535532879334080517> → <:gflurry:535532879283879977> → <:varanussmercy:1448697873603498045> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:chaosroar:1478062908767211640> → <:varanussmercy:1448697873603498045> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:overpower:535532879334080517> → <:cane:535532878969438210> → <:punish:535532879439069184>

*Note: if <:ezk:903244090953588787> <:spec:537340400273195028> is on CD can do <:cane:535532878969438210> → <:varanussmercy:1448697873603498045> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099>*

.
### __Phase 7__
.
### Melee
**Demon:** <:demonslayer:641339921675845633> + <:overpower:535532879334080517> → <:adaptivestrike:1478062906057949417>
**Zamorak:** <:meteorstrike:1478070401702821938> → <:meleebasic:1478062907295010906> → <:dba:603979368850653216> <:spec:537340400273195028> + <:adrenrenewal:736298121704767538> → <:berserk:535532854004678657> → <:anti:535541306475151390>
**Rune 1:** <:gbarge:535532879250456578> → <:punish:535532879439069184>
**Rune 2:** <:gflurry:535532879283879977>
**Zamorak:** <:chaosroar:1478062908767211640> → <:ezk:903244090953588787> <:spec:537340400273195028> → <:overpower:535532879334080517> → <:varanussmercy:1448697873603498045> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:cane:535532878969438210>

*Note: only if you did not use <:ezk:903244090953588787> <:spec:537340400273195028> during phase 6.*

.
### Ranged
**Demon:** <:demonslayer:641339921675845633> + <:deathsporearrows:900758234527301642> <:rapid:535541270521708566>
**Zamorak:** <:piercingshot:1478061863723073636> → <:rangedbasic:1478061858622537809> → <:gdeathsswift:994644354536837121> → <:imbueshadows:1478061866193518744>
**Rune 1:** <:fularrow:971025696958853180> <:bolg:994189289623662702> <:spec:537340400273195028> → <:grico:787904334812807238>
**Rune 2:** <:ecb:615618531937222657> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:snapshot:1478061855732666439> → <:galeshot:1478061864943616122>
**Zamorak:** <:rapid:535541270521708566> → <:sgb:626466665848242186> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:deadshot:1478061860371828929> → <:gloomfirebow:1446178203608809472> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099>

.
